transcription.text: We are the Saunders, and we're new to the Pacific Northwest. The rain, the mud, ba-bam! It's there. The outside comes in. It's kind of nasty, so you start the towel mop shuffle. Where are you, son? Oh wow, it's a Swiffer wet jet. This puts my towel mopping to shame. Sunshine is overrated. Now we can get messy.

metadata.title: 2014 Swiffer WetJet Give Cleaning a Whole New Meaning Mopping up Muddy Messes with the Saunders
